title: BYOK Provider Pool (failover + cooldown)
description: EXTENDS byok. Graceful multi-credential failover over the modelCreds rows that already exist (personal + workspace-shared). fallbackRules.ts is a pure, config-driven error→verdict table (429→exp backoff 1s·2^n cap 240s; 5xx→short cooldown; 401/invalid_grant/token_revoked→dead until re-auth). providerPool.pickCredentials returns up to 3 LIVE creds (priority-then-LRU); markCredResult cools/kills a cred. A ≤3-attempt loop in callForUser's BYOK generateText branch tries each live cred in turn. codex/claude OAuth creds are single-cred and NOT pooled.
